expectations.text: Uses the C4 stdlib include (!include <C4/C4_Container> or the GitHub URL fallback)
Does NOT include !theme plain (C4 stdlib applies its own style)
Every Container() / ContainerDb() / ContainerQueue() call has a technology label as the 3rd positional arg
expectations.evidence: every Container has tech label (React/TypeScript, Go/gRPC, etc.)

expectations.text: Stripe and SendGrid are declared with System_Ext (greyed) — not System or Container
At least one Person() is declared (the customer)
Every Rel() has a non-empty label describing the relationship
Routed to C4 container diagram (no other level mixed in — no internal components, no Context-level wrap)
